name: update_ticket
description: Update an existing support ticket. Change its status, priority, assignee, or add a new public or internal comment. This is the primary way agents progress tickets through the resolution workflow.

parameters.name: ticket_id
parameters.description: The ID of the ticket to update.

parameters.name: assignee_id
parameters.description: ID of the agent to reassign the ticket to.

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: A new comment to add. Set 'public' to false for internal notes.

example.body: Password has been reset. Customer should try logging in again.

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Replace existing tags with this list.

comment.body: Password has been reset. Customer should try logging in again.
